name: upy-generate-plugin
description: Workflow plugin phase for generating MicroPython business firmware code, dependencies, cloud/API setup plans, tests, checks, git commits, and downstream phase handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Generates MicroPython firmware code and cloud/API setup plans after scaffold.
interface.longDescription: Consumes upy-scaffold-plugin phase_complete manifest_content and emits generated firmware code artifacts, cloud/API provider setup prompts, MicroPython-aware checks, git commit metadata, and downstream deploy/simulate handoff.
defaultPrompt: Run generate from a scaffold phase_complete.
Generate firmware that uses a cloud LLM/API and prompt for provider credentials safely.
Fix generated MicroPython firmware after deploy feedback.
